company_description: Devolutions is a Canadian software company providing productivity and security solutions for IT professionals, including remote connection management, privileged access management, password management, and IT automation tools.

products.name: Devolutions Remote Desktop Manager
products.description: All-in-one remote connection and credential management tool that centralizes RDP, SSH, VPN, and other remote sessions with integrated password management for IT professionals.

products.name: Devolutions Server
products.description: Self-hosted vault and privileged access management platform that stores, shares, and audits credentials and remote connections across enterprise teams.

products.name: Devolutions PAM
products.description: Privileged access management solution that secures, rotates, and audits every privileged account across IT infrastructure to reduce insider threat and attack surface.

products.name: Devolutions Gateway
products.description: Secure remote access gateway that provides a VPN-free entry point for internal or external segmented networks requiring authorized just-in-time (JIT) access.

products.name: Devolutions Hub Business
products.description: Cloud-hosted team password manager and credential vault designed to improve workforce security without reducing productivity for business teams.

products.name: Devolutions Workspace
products.description: Companion mobile and desktop app that provides unified access to Devolutions Hub and Server vaults for secure password and credential management on the go.

products.name: Devolutions PowerShell Universal
products.description: IT automation platform that enables scripting, orchestration, dashboards, and REST APIs using PowerShell to streamline routine remote management tasks.

products.name: Devolutions Launcher
products.description: Companion tool that launches remote connections directly from Devolutions Hub or Server without requiring a full Remote Desktop Manager installation.

products.name: UniGetUI
products.description: Open-source Windows package manager UI that enables IT professionals to discover, install, and update software packages across multiple package managers from a single interface.

products.name: Devolutions Academy
products.description: Devolutions' official training and certification program covering Remote Desktop Manager, PAM, Hub, Server, and related security products.

competitive_products.competitive_context: Enterprise-grade PAM platform competing directly with Devolutions PAM and Devolutions Server in the privileged access management space.
Competes with Devolutions Remote Desktop Manager and PAM for remote access and privileged session management in enterprise environments.
Cloud-hosted team password manager competing with Devolutions Hub Business for workforce credential management.
Open-source-based password manager with self-hosted option competing with Devolutions Server and Hub Business.
Multi-platform remote connection manager that directly competes with Devolutions Remote Desktop Manager for IT professional workflows.
Broader IT automation platform competing with Devolutions PowerShell Universal for scripting and orchestration workflows.
